title: I Info
text: I Info Information (connector characteristics). Modes Mode 0—provides Uniface with DBMS and connector characteristics. The mode 0 Info request must be successful. The Info request can be called several times, although identical characteristics should be returned for each call. Mode 1—provides Uniface with the user name and password corresponding to the current logon path. If the connector is not capable of providing logon information, this can be unsuccessful. This request is called when there is a reference to $user or $password in ProcScript language. Conditions When the Info request is called in mode 1, there is a current logon path. Description This request provides Uniface with DBMS and connector characteristics, or supplies logon information. Refer to: Uniface Database I/O Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
